code: import api,{firstSuccess}from'./api';export const orderItemService={createOrderItem:async item=>(await firstSuccess([()=>api.post('/api/order-items',item),()=>api.post('/order-items',item)])).data,getItemsByOrderId:async orderId=>(await firstSuccess([()=>api.get("/api/order-items/order/".concat(orderId)),()=>api.get("/order-items/order/".concat(orderId))])).data};
